compiled_state.title: [create-dso-app/detect_dso_plugin_root]: probe 2 matches plugin.json on filesystem but not registered in installed_plugins.json -> stale files short-circuit auto-install; fresh project has no registered plugin scope -> /dso:* commands unavailable in new project
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

detect_dso_plugin_root() in scripts/create-dso-app.sh probes 2 and 2b check filesystem existence of plugin.json at marketplace/cache paths. If files exist from a prior install, probes match and auto-install (probe 4) is skipped. But Claude Code loads plugins based on installed_plugins.json registry membership — filesystem presence is insufficient.

## Observed
Fresh `create-dso-app my-project` run:
- Installer prints no "DSO plugin not found locally — installing..." line (auto-install path not reached)
- Post-install ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json has dso@digital-service-orchestra scoped to OTHER project paths (/Users/joeoakhart/lockpick-doc-to-logic, etc.) but none for the freshly created project dir
- When user runs `claude` in the new project, /dso:* commands are NOT available even though plugin files exist at the marketplace path

## Expected
After create-dso-app completes, the DSO plugin is registered (either user-scope or project-scope pointing at the new project) so Claude Code loads it when launched in the new project.

## Root cause
Probe 2/2b check filesystem existence as sufficient — but filesystem presence ≠ registry membership. `claude plugin install` call (probe 4) is guarded behind `-z "$plugin_root"` so it never runs when stale marketplace files exist from a prior user install targeting a different project.

## Severity
P1 — every user who has ever installed DSO once gets a broken fresh install.

## Reproducer (needs user confirmation)
1. Ensure marketplace path has plugin.json (from any prior `claude plugin install dso@...`)
2. rm -rf ~/fresh-test && bash <(curl ...) fresh-test
3. Installer completes without "installing via Claude Code marketplace" line
4. cat ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json | grep fresh-test  → empty
5. cd ~/fresh-test && claude → try /dso:onboarding — not available

comments.body: Fix implemented: moved claude plugin install out of the '[ -z $plugin_root ]' guard in detect_dso_plugin_root. Now runs unconditionally from project_dir with --scope project whenever claude CLI is available, so fresh projects get their own enabled plugin registration regardless of stale marketplace files. Also fixed Bug #1 mktemp regression under restricted test PATH by using a path under project_dir for detect output. RED test test_detect_dso_plugin_root_registers_plugin_even_when_probe_matches now GREEN (captures claude CLI invocation with correct argv and cwd). Full regression: 56/56 test-create-dso-app, 3/3 Bug1, 79/79 dso-setup, 8/8 Bug2.
comments.author: Test
